deep_dive.title: Koopman Spectral Analysis of Lithium-Ion Battery Dynamics: State of Charge as a Marginally Stable Observable
deep_dive.abstract: Accurate state-of-charge (SOC) estimation remains a fundamental challenge in lithium-ion battery management systems because battery dynamics are highly nonlinear, operating-condition dependent, and sensitive to parameter variations caused by aging and temperature. Conventional model-based estimators, such as equivalent circuit model (ECM) and Kalman-filter-based approaches, rely heavily on repeated parameter identification and accurate electrochemical modeling, whereas purely data-driven methods often sacrifice physical interpretability.   This work proposes a Koopman-theoretic, data-driven framework for SOC estimation using Dynamic Mode Decomposition with control (DMDc) combined with Hankel time-delay embedding. Instead of explicitly identifying ECM parameters, the proposed approach reconstructs a lifted dynamical state space directly from measured terminal voltage and current obtained through Hybrid Pulse Power Characterization (HPPC) testing. Spectral decomposition of the identified DMDc operator reveals intrinsic battery dynamics in terms of Koopman modes and eigenvalues. The SOC dynamics naturally emerge as the slowest marginally stable mode whose eigenvalue lies closest to the unit circle, consistent with the integrator-type behavior of charge conservation. The corresponding modal coordinate is subsequently utilized as an SOC-sensitive observable.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Proposes Koopman-based SOC estimation, mentions ECM and Kalman filter
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 提出基于Koopman的SOC估计，提及ECM和卡尔曼滤波
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 提出基于Koopman的SOC估计，提及ECM和卡尔曼滤波
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 提出基于Koopman的SOC估计，提及ECM和卡尔曼滤波
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Addresses nonlinear SOC estimation challenge in Li-ion batteries by proposing a Koopman-theoretic data-driven framework using DMDc and Hankel embedding, which avoids repeated parameter identification of ECM and Kalman filters, and provides accurate and interpretable SOC estimates.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 针对锂离子电池荷电状态估计因强非线性、工况多变及老化温度敏感导致的准确度下降问题，提出一种基于Koopman算子理论的数据驱动方法。通过带控制的动态模式分解与Hankel时滞嵌入将非线性动态转换为线性演化，克服了对等效电路模型参数辨识和卡尔曼滤波器调谐的依赖。实验验证了该方法在多种工况下能准确估计SOC并保持物理可解释性，为电池管理系统提供了更鲁棒的估计框架。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 针对锂离子电池荷电状态估计因强非线性、工况多变及老化温度敏感导致的准确度下降问题，提出一种基于Koopman算子理论的数据驱动方法。通过带控制的动态模式分解与Hankel时滞嵌入将非线性动态转换为线性演化，克服了对等效电路模型参数辨识和卡尔曼滤波器调谐的依赖。实验验证了该方法在多种工况下能准确估计SOC并保持物理可解释性，为电池管理系统提供了更鲁棒的估计框架。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: state of charge estimation for lithium ion batteries

quick_skim.title: Finite-Time Thermodynamics of Battery Discharging: Power-Efficiency Trade-Off and Optimization
quick_skim.abstract: Battery discharging is governed by a fundamental trade-off between output power and energy conversion efficiency due to internal dissipation. In this paper, we demonstrate that such a trade-off universally yields a parabolic envelope $P\proptoη(1-η)$. The efficiency at maximum power is exactly one half, mirroring the well-known half-Carnot limit in finite-time thermodynamics. To extend this bound into practical operational rules, we formulate a multistage constant-current discharging (MSCD) schedule subject to simultaneous real-time load demands and a global discharging deadline. Analytical resolution via the Karush--Kuhn--Tucker conditions reveals a remarkably compact optimal policy: $I_{i}^{\star}=\max(I_{i}^{-},I_{0})$. Under this rule, stages limited by external demand run exactly at their minimum required currents, while all remaining stages are elevated to a uniform baseline $I_{0}$ fixed by the deadline constraint. By tracing the dissipation--time Pareto front, we quantify how internal resistance shifts the operational boundaries and sharpens the trade-off corner. This analysis establishes a rigorous thermodynamic baseline for the scheduling layer of battery management systems, offering natural extensions to nonlinear models incorporating temperature and state-of-charge dependencies.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: battery discharging power-efficiency trade-off and optimization under fast discharge
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 电池放电功率-效率权衡与快速放电优化
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 电池放电功率-效率权衡与快速放电优化
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 电池放电功率-效率权衡与快速放电优化
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: This paper derives a universal power-efficiency trade-off during battery discharging, yielding a parabolic envelope, and formulates an optimal multistage constant-current discharging schedule, providing practical rules for efficient fast discharge.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 本文推导出电池放电过程中普遍的功率-效率权衡关系，得到抛物线包络，并制定最优多阶段恒流放电调度，为高效快速放电提供实用规则。分析了有限时间热力学背景下电池放电的功率与效率折衷，证明最大功率时效率为二分之一，并提出满足实时负载和全局截止时间的最优策略，有助于电池管理系统中的快速放电控制。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 本文推导出电池放电过程中普遍的功率-效率权衡关系，得到抛物线包络，并制定最优多阶段恒流放电调度，为高效快速放电提供实用规则。分析了有限时间热力学背景下电池放电的功率与效率折衷，证明最大功率时效率为二分之一，并提出满足实时负载和全局截止时间的最优策略，有助于电池管理系统中的快速放电控制。
